name: Grade 2 Reading — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 2 pathway for fluency, comprehension, story structure, and informational text features. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 2 knowledge and transferable skills in fluency, comprehension, story structure, and informational text features.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

outcomes: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about fluency, comprehension, story structure, and informational text features.
I can use appropriate disciplinary vocabulary, evidence, and tools to communicate my reasoning.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about fluency, comprehension, story structure, and informational text features, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 2 task connected to fluency, comprehension, story structure, and informational text features.
